18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - First Crucible (local builds)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	test -z "${ZRBHOFC_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
24	ZRBHOFC_SOURCED=1
25	
26	######################################################################
27	# First Crucible — local builds onboarding
28	#
29	# Frame 4-refined handbook: teaching prose + probes + tabtarget refs.
30	# Target learner: crucible explorer — local-only, zero cloud, fast
31	# iteration for security exploration. Zero registry, zero SA credentials.
32	#
33	# Nameplate: ccyolo  (Claude Code sandbox, Anthropic-only network)
34	# Vessels:   rbev-sentry-deb-tether (sentry), rbev-bottle-ccyolo (bottle)
35	#
36	# ₢A6AAC DRAFT — content ready for implementation review.
37	# Infrastructure gaps are marked with [INFRA-NEEDED] comments.
38	# Assumptions are marked with [ASSUMPTION].
39	
40	rbho_first_crucible() {
41	  zrbho_sentinel
42	
43	  buc_doc_brief "Start a Crucible using local builds — kludge, charge, SSH, verify containment"
44	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
45	
46	  # Hardcoded for this track — ccyolo is the teaching nameplate
47	  local -r z_moniker="ccyolo"
48	  local -r z_sentry_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"
49	  local -r z_bottle_vessel="rbev-bottle-ccyolo"
50	  local -r z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
51	  local -r z_ssh_tabtarget="tt/rbw-cS.SshTo.${z_moniker}.sh"
52	
53	  # Inline yelps (not worth kindle constants — track-specific)
54	  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbw-fk";                 local -r z_cmd_rbw_fk="${z_buym_yelp}"
55	  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbw-cKB";                local -r z_cmd_rbw_cKB="${z_buym_yelp}"
56	  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK=";  local -r z_cmd_sentry_hallmark="${z_buym_yelp}"
57	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_ssh_tabtarget}";     local -r z_cmd_ssh="${z_buym_yelp}"
58	  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK";   local -r z_code_sentry_field="${z_buym_yelp}"
59	  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK";   local -r z_code_bottle_field="${z_buym_yelp}"
60	  buyy_cmd_yawp "k260413155458-f9dcb6d9"; local -r z_example_tag="${z_buym_yelp}"
61	
62	  local -r z_test_domain="www.internic.net"
63	
64	  # --- Probes ---
65	
66	  # Docker runtime
67	  local z_has_docker=0
68	  command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_has_docker=1
69	
70	  # Nameplate exists
71	  local z_nameplate_exists=0
72	  test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" && z_nameplate_exists=1
73	
74	  # Hallmarks populated in nameplate
75	  local z_sentry_hallmark=""
76	  local z_bottle_hallmark=""
77	  local z_sentry_hallmark_present=0
78	  local z_bottle_hallmark_present=0
79	  if test "${z_nameplate_exists}" = "1"; then
80	    z_sentry_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_nameplate_file}" "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK") || z_sentry_hallmark=""
81	    z_bottle_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_nameplate_file}" "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK") || z_bottle_hallmark=""
82	    test -n "${z_sentry_hallmark}" && z_sentry_hallmark_present=1
83	    test -n "${z_bottle_hallmark}" && z_bottle_hallmark_present=1
84	  fi
85	
86	  # Kludge-tagged images exist locally (k-prefixed hallmarks)
87	  local z_sentry_image_exists=0
88	  local z_bottle_image_exists=0
89	  local z_line=""
90	  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "1"; then
91	    local -r z_fc_images_out="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_IMAGES_PREFIX}4_repotag.txt"
92	    local -r z_fc_images_err="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX}5_repotag.txt"
93	    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
94	         > "${z_fc_images_out}" 2>"${z_fc_images_err}"; then
95	      while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
96	        case "${z_line}" in
97	          *"${z_sentry_vessel}:k"[0-9]*) z_sentry_image_exists=1 ;;
98	          *"${z_bottle_vessel}:k"[0-9]*) z_bottle_image_exists=1 ;;
99	        esac
100	      done < "${z_fc_images_out}"
101	    fi
102	  fi
103	
104	  # Crucible charged
105	  # [INFRA-NEEDED] Currently rbw-cic is a tabtarget (param1 channel).
106	  # For probe use, need a scriptable function that returns 0/1 without
107	  # running the full dispatch. For now, check docker containers directly.
108	  local z_crucible_charged=0
109	  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "1"; then
110	    local -r z_fc_ps_out="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_PS_PREFIX}2_names.txt"
111	    local -r z_fc_ps_err="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX}6_ps.txt"
112	    if docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" > "${z_fc_ps_out}" 2>"${z_fc_ps_err}"; then
113	      while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
114	        case "${z_line}" in "${z_moniker}-bottle") z_crucible_charged=1; break ;; esac
115	      done < "${z_fc_ps_out}"
116	    fi
117	  fi
118	
119	  # --- Header ---
120	  buh_section "Start a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} Using Local Builds"
121	  buh_e
122	  buh_line "A ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} is a sandboxed container environment with enforced"
123	  buh_line "network isolation. You are going to build one on your workstation"
124	  buh_line "and run Claude Code inside it — no cloud account, no credentials"
125	  buh_line "beyond your own Claude subscription."
126	  buh_e
127	  buh_line "This track uses the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}: a Claude Code sandbox that can"
128	  buh_line "only reach Anthropic. Everything else is blocked."
129	  buh_e
130	
131	  # Docker gate
132	  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "0"; then
133	    buh_error "Docker is not available on this machine."
134	    buh_line  "Install Docker Desktop (or dockerd in WSL) and re-run this handbook."
135	    buh_e
136	    buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
137	    buh_e
138	    return 0
139	  fi
140	
141	  buh_line "Prerequisite: a Claude OAuth subscription (you will authenticate"
142	  buh_line "inside the container via copy/paste from your browser)."
143	  buh_e
144	
145	  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
146	
147	  buh_step1 "Build images locally"
148	  buh_e
149	  buh_line "A ${RBYC_VESSEL} is a specification for a container image — a Dockerfile"
150	  buh_line "and build context. A ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is a specific build instance,"
151	  buh_line "identified by a timestamp tag."
152	  buh_e
153	  buh_line "${RBYC_KLUDGE} builds a ${RBYC_VESSEL} image locally using Docker — no cloud, no"
154	  buh_line "registry, no credentials. The fastest path from Dockerfile to running"
155	  buh_line "container without cloud build involvement.  Note this only builds for the"
156	  buh_line "host platform."
157	  buh_e
158	
159	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
160	  buh_e
161	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} is the gatekeeper container. It runs iptables"
162	  buh_line "and dnsmasq to enforce network policy — only domains you whitelist"
163	  buh_line "are reachable from inside."
164	  buh_e
165	  buh_line "Build it:"
166	  buh_e
167	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}" "" " ${z_sentry_vessel}"
168	  buh_e
169	  buh_line "The output prints a ${RBYC_HALLMARK} tag — something like"
170	  buh_line "  ${z_example_tag}"
171	  buh_line "Copy it. You will paste it into the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} in Step 2."
172	  buh_e
173	
174	  if test "${z_sentry_image_exists}" = "1"; then
175	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_KLUDGE}-tagged ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally"
176	  else
177	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No ${RBYC_KLUDGE}-tagged ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found"
178	  fi
179	  buh_e
180	
181	  buh_warn "${RBYC_KLUDGE} requires a clean git tree."
182	  buh_line "If you have uncommitted changes, commit them first.  This is by"
183	  buh_line "design — container images not backed by git commits easy to confuse."
184	  buh_e
185	
186	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
187	  buh_e
188	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your workload container — where Claude Code"
189	  buh_line "runs. The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} includes SSH, node, and the Claude CLI."
190	  buh_e
191	  buh_line "This command is different from the ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_KLUDGE}. It builds the"
192	  buh_line "${RBYC_BOTTLE} AND drives the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
193	  buh_line "automatically:"
194	  buh_e
195	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
196	  buh_e
197	  buh_line "Two ${RBYC_KLUDGE} commands, two different jobs:"
198	  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_fk}  — standalone ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${RBYC_KLUDGE}. Produces a ${RBYC_HALLMARK}, touches nothing else."
199	  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_cKB} — ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}-aware ${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_KLUDGE}. Builds AND installs the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}."
200	  buh_e
201	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} is shared across ${RBYC_NAMEPLATES}, so you ${RBYC_KLUDGE} it standalone"
202	  buh_line "and drive the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} yourself. The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} belongs to one ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE},"
203	  buh_line "so the tool does the driving for you."
204	  buh_e
205	
206	  # Bottle kludge image probe
207	  if test "${z_bottle_image_exists}" = "1"; then
208	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_KLUDGE}-tagged ${RBYC_BOTTLE} image found locally"
209	  else
210	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No ${RBYC_KLUDGE}-tagged ${RBYC_BOTTLE} image found"
211	  fi
212	  buh_e
213	
214	  # =================================================================
215	  # Step 2: Drive sentry hallmark into the nameplate
216	  # =================================================================
217	  buh_step1 "Drive ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
218	  buh_e
219	  buh_line "A ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} is the file that defines a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} — it specifies"
220	  buh_line "what ${RBYC_HALLMARK} to use for ${RBYC_SENTRY}, ${RBYC_PENTACLE}, and"
221	  buh_line "${RBYC_BOTTLE} containers. It lives at:"
222	  buh_e
223	  buh_code "   ${z_nameplate_file}"
224	  buh_e
225	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RBRN} file has two ${RBYC_HALLMARK} fields — one for the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
226	  buh_line "and one for the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}. The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_KLUDGE} (Step 1.2) already drove"
227	  buh_line "its ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Now you drive the ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} by hand."
228	  buh_e
229	  buh_line "Open the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} file and paste the ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from Step 1.1"
230	  buh_line "into the ${z_cmd_sentry_hallmark} field."
231	  buh_e
232	  buh_line "This is deliberately manual — it teaches you what ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} are and"
233	  buh_line "where they live. You just saw the automated version with the ${RBYC_BOTTLE};"
234	  buh_line "now you see the mechanism underneath."
235	  buh_e
236	
237	  # Hallmark probes
238	  if test "${z_sentry_hallmark_present}" = "1"; then
239	    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_sentry_field} = ${z_sentry_hallmark}"
240	  else
241	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK is empty — paste the ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from Step 1.1"
242	  fi
243	  if test "${z_bottle_hallmark_present}" = "1"; then
244	    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_bottle_field} = ${z_bottle_hallmark}"
245	  else
246	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK is empty — run Step 1.2 (${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_KLUDGE})"
247	  fi
248	  buh_e
249	
250	  buh_line "After editing, commit the change — the next ${RBYC_KLUDGE} will need a"
251	  buh_line "clean tree:"
252	  buh_e
253	  buh_code "   git add ${z_nameplate_file}"
254	  buh_code "   git commit -m \"Drive sentry hallmark into ${z_moniker} nameplate\""
255	  buh_e
256	
257	  # =================================================================
258	  # Step 3: Charge the crucible
259	  # =================================================================
260	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CHARGE} the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}"
261	  buh_e
262	  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} starts three containers from your ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}:"
263	  buh_e
264	  buh_line "  ${RBYC_SENTRY}    — runs iptables + dnsmasq, enforces the network allowlist"
265	  buh_line "  ${RBYC_PENTACLE}  — establishes the network namespace shared with the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
266	  buh_line "  ${RBYC_BOTTLE}    — your workload container (Claude Code lives here)"
267	  buh_e
268	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} mediates all traffic. The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} never touches the"
269	  buh_line "network directly — everything routes through the ${RBYC_SENTRY_P} rules."
270	  buh_e
271	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
272	  buh_e
273	  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} takes 10-30 seconds. It pulls the images from your local"
274	  buh_line "Docker, creates the ${RBYC_ENCLAVE} network, starts the containers,"
275	  buh_line "waits for the ${RBYC_SENTRY} to confirm its iptables rules are"
276	  buh_line "applied, then starts the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}."
277	  buh_e
278	
279	  # Charged probe
280	  if test "${z_crucible_charged}" = "1"; then
281	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} ${z_moniker} is charged (${RBYC_BOTTLE} container running)"
282	  else
283	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} ${z_moniker} is not charged"
284	  fi
285	  buh_e
286	
287	  # =================================================================
288	  # Step 4: Enter the container and run Claude Code
289	  # =================================================================
290	  buh_step1 "Enter the container and run Claude Code"
291	  buh_e
292	  buh_line "SSH into the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
293	  buh_e
294	  buh_line "   ${z_cmd_ssh}"
295	  buh_e
296	  buh_line "You land as the claude user in ~/workspace, which contains"
297	  buh_line "a small sample project. Run Claude Code:"
298	  buh_e
299	  buh_code "   claude"
300	  buh_e
301	  buh_line "Claude Code will prompt you to authenticate. It opens a URL —"
302	  buh_line "copy it to your workstation browser, sign in with your Claude"
303	  buh_line "subscription, and paste the code back into the terminal."
304	  buh_e
305	  buh_warn "The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} pins Claude Code to a specific version."
306	  buh_line "Versions after v2.1.89 have a regression where paste does not"
307	  buh_line "work in the OAuth input prompt through SSH or docker exec"
308	  buh_line "(github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/47745). If you"
309	  buh_line "update the pin and paste stops working, type the code manually."
310	  buh_e
311	  buh_line "Once authenticated, Claude Code starts in full autonomy mode —"
312	  buh_line "no permission prompts. Inside a network-contained ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE},"
313	  buh_line "this is the correct posture: the ${RBYC_SENTRY} enforces the real"
314	  buh_line "security boundary, not the tool permission system."
315	  buh_e
316	  buh_line "Try your first interaction:"
317	  buh_e
318	  buh_code "   The count_words.sh script has bugs — can you find and fix them?"
319	  buh_e
320	  buh_line "Watch Claude read the files, identify issues, and edit the code."
321	  buh_line "The workspace is a bind mount — edits inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} are"
322	  buh_line "visible on the host filesystem, and vice versa. Your repo"
323	  buh_line "working tree gets dirty when you work inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE},"
324	  buh_line "and that is the point."
325	  buh_e
326	  buh_line "Why SSH instead of docker exec?"
327	  buh_e
328	  buh_line "Docker exec is laggy and breaks terminal resize — Claude Code's"
329	  buh_line "interactive display needs correct dimensions. SSH gives a proper"
330	  buh_line "login session with full terminal negotiation."
331	  buh_e
332	  buh_line "If SSH fails, ${RBYC_RACK} is the diagnostic fallback —"
333	  buh_line "docker exec into the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} to inspect state:"
334	  buh_e
335	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
336	  buh_e
337	
338	  # =================================================================
339	  # Step 5: Verify network containment
340	  # =================================================================
341	  buh_step1 "Verify network containment"
342	  buh_e
343	  buh_line "From inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} (while SSH'd in), you can test what's reachable."
344	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} allows Anthropic and ${z_test_domain} (a test"
345	  buh_line "target — ICANN-owned, stable). Everything else is blocked."
346	  buh_e
347	  buh_line "Run these curl commands inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
348	  buh_e
349	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://api.anthropic.com"
350	  buh_line "   Expected: 404 (API wants auth, not bare GET)"
351	  buh_e
352	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://claude.ai"
353	  buh_line "   Expected: 403 (web app)"
354	  buh_e
355	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://${z_test_domain}"
356	  buh_line "   Expected: 200 (test target on allowlist)"
357	  buh_e
358	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://google.com"
359	  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
360	  buh_e
361	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://registry.npmjs.org"
362	  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
363	  buh_e
364	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} enforces this with two layers:"
365	  buh_line "dnsmasq resolves only whitelisted domains; iptables drops"
366	  buh_line "packets to any IP not in the CIDR allowlist. Both layers"
367	  buh_line "must agree for traffic to pass."
368	  buh_e
369	  buh_line "${z_test_domain} is included in the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
370	  buh_line "specifically for this verification step — it proves the"
371	  buh_line "allowlist works for a non-Anthropic domain."
372	  buh_e
373	
374	  # =================================================================
375	  # Step 6: Quench the crucible
376	  # =================================================================
377	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_QUENCH} the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}"
378	  buh_e
379	  buh_line "${RBYC_QUENCH} stops and removes all three containers and the"
380	  buh_line "${RBYC_ENCLAVE} network:"
381	  buh_e
382	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH}" "${z_moniker}"
383	  buh_e
384	  buh_line "Clean shutdown. The images stay cached locally — your next ${RBYC_CHARGE}"
385	  buh_line "reuses them instantly."
386	  buh_e
387	
388	  # =================================================================
389	  # Iteration loop
390	  # =================================================================
391	  buh_section "The iteration loop"
392	  buh_e
393	  buh_line "You now have the full local cycle:"
394	  buh_e
395	  buh_line "  1. Edit the Dockerfile or entrypoint"
396	  buh_line "  2. Commit your changes (${RBYC_KLUDGE} needs a clean tree)"
397	  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
398	  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
399	  buh_line  "  4. Commit the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} change"
400	  buh_line  "  5. ${RBYC_CHARGE}: Stop and restart"
401	  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
402	  buh_line  "  6. SSH in:"
403	  buh_line  "       ${z_cmd_ssh}"
404	  buh_line  "  7. Test your changes"
405	  buh_e
406	  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} tears down any prior state before starting, so you"
407	  buh_line "don't need to ${RBYC_QUENCH} between iterations — just ${RBYC_CHARGE} again."
408	  buh_e
409	  buh_line "Steps 3-7 take under a minute. The ${RBYC_SENTRY} rarely changes, so"
410	  buh_line "you almost never re-${RBYC_KLUDGE} it — the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your iteration"
411	  buh_line "target."
412	  buh_e
413	
414	  # --- Return to start ---
415	  buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
416	  buh_e
417	}
418	
419	# eof

#!/bin/bash
#

#

# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - First Crucible (local builds)

set -euo pipefail

test -z "${ZRBHOFC_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
ZRBHOFC_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# First Crucible — local builds onboarding
#
# Frame 4-refined handbook: teaching prose + probes + tabtarget refs.
# Target learner: crucible explorer — local-only, zero cloud, fast
# iteration for security exploration. Zero registry, zero SA credentials.
#
# Nameplate: ccyolo  (Claude Code sandbox, Anthropic-only network)
# Vessels:   rbev-sentry-deb-tether (sentry), rbev-bottle-ccyolo (bottle)
#
# ₢A6AAC DRAFT — content ready for implementation review.
# Infrastructure gaps are marked with [INFRA-NEEDED] comments.
# Assumptions are marked with [ASSUMPTION].

rbho_first_crucible() {
  zrbho_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Start a Crucible using local builds — kludge, charge, SSH, verify containment"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Hardcoded for this track — ccyolo is the teaching nameplate
  local -r z_moniker="ccyolo"
  local -r z_sentry_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"
  local -r z_bottle_vessel="rbev-bottle-ccyolo"
  local -r z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
  local -r z_ssh_tabtarget="tt/rbw-cS.SshTo.${z_moniker}.sh"

  # Inline yelps (not worth kindle constants — track-specific)
  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbw-fk";                 local -r z_cmd_rbw_fk="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbw-cKB";                local -r z_cmd_rbw_cKB="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK=";  local -r z_cmd_sentry_hallmark="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_ssh_tabtarget}";     local -r z_cmd_ssh="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK";   local -r z_code_sentry_field="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK";   local -r z_code_bottle_field="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "k260413155458-f9dcb6d9"; local -r z_example_tag="${z_buym_yelp}"

  local -r z_test_domain="www.internic.net"

  # --- Probes ---

  # Docker runtime
  local z_has_docker=0
  command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_has_docker=1

  # Nameplate exists
  local z_nameplate_exists=0
  test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" && z_nameplate_exists=1

  # Hallmarks populated in nameplate
  local z_sentry_hallmark=""
  local z_bottle_hallmark=""
  local z_sentry_hallmark_present=0
  local z_bottle_hallmark_present=0
  if test "${z_nameplate_exists}" = "1"; then
    z_sentry_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_nameplate_file}" "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK") || z_sentry_hallmark=""
    z_bottle_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_nameplate_file}" "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK") || z_bottle_hallmark=""
    test -n "${z_sentry_hallmark}" && z_sentry_hallmark_present=1
    test -n "${z_bottle_hallmark}" && z_bottle_hallmark_present=1
  fi

  # Kludge-tagged images exist locally (k-prefixed hallmarks)
  local z_sentry_image_exists=0
  local z_bottle_image_exists=0
  local z_line=""
  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "1"; then
    local -r z_fc_images_out="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_IMAGES_PREFIX}4_repotag.txt"
    local -r z_fc_images_err="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX}5_repotag.txt"
    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
         > "${z_fc_images_out}" 2>"${z_fc_images_err}"; then
      while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
        case "${z_line}" in
          *"${z_sentry_vessel}:k"[0-9]*) z_sentry_image_exists=1 ;;
          *"${z_bottle_vessel}:k"[0-9]*) z_bottle_image_exists=1 ;;
        esac
      done < "${z_fc_images_out}"
    fi
  fi

  # Crucible charged
  # [INFRA-NEEDED] Currently rbw-cic is a tabtarget (param1 channel).
  # For probe use, need a scriptable function that returns 0/1 without
  # running the full dispatch. For now, check docker containers directly.
  local z_crucible_charged=0
  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "1"; then
    local -r z_fc_ps_out="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_PS_PREFIX}2_names.txt"
    local -r z_fc_ps_err="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX}6_ps.txt"
    if docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" > "${z_fc_ps_out}" 2>"${z_fc_ps_err}"; then
      while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
        case "${z_line}" in "${z_moniker}-bottle") z_crucible_charged=1; break ;; esac
      done < "${z_fc_ps_out}"
    fi
  fi

  # --- Header ---
  buh_section "Start a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} Using Local Builds"
  buh_e
  buh_line "A ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} is a sandboxed container environment with enforced"
  buh_line "network isolation. You are going to build one on your workstation"
  buh_line "and run Claude Code inside it — no cloud account, no credentials"
  buh_line "beyond your own Claude subscription."
  buh_e
  buh_line "This track uses the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}: a Claude Code sandbox that can"
  buh_line "only reach Anthropic. Everything else is blocked."
  buh_e

  # Docker gate
  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "0"; then
    buh_error "Docker is not available on this machine."
    buh_line  "Install Docker Desktop (or dockerd in WSL) and re-run this handbook."
    buh_e
    buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
    buh_e
    return 0
  fi

  buh_line "Prerequisite: a Claude OAuth subscription (you will authenticate"
  buh_line "inside the container via copy/paste from your browser)."
  buh_e

  buh_step_style "Step " " — "

  buh_step1 "Build images locally"
  buh_e
  buh_line "A ${RBYC_VESSEL} is a specification for a container image — a Dockerfile"
  buh_line "and build context. A ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is a specific build instance,"
  buh_line "identified by a timestamp tag."
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_KLUDGE} builds a ${RBYC_VESSEL} image locally using Docker — no cloud, no"
  buh_line "registry, no credentials. The fastest path from Dockerfile to running"
  buh_line "container without cloud build involvement.  Note this only builds for the"
  buh_line "host platform."
  buh_e

  buh_step2 "${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} is the gatekeeper container. It runs iptables"
  buh_line "and dnsmasq to enforce network policy — only domains you whitelist"
  buh_line "are reachable from inside."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Build it:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}" "" " ${z_sentry_vessel}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The output prints a ${RBYC_HALLMARK} tag — something like"
  buh_line "  ${z_example_tag}"
  buh_line "Copy it. You will paste it into the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} in Step 2."
  buh_e

  if test "${z_sentry_image_exists}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_KLUDGE}-tagged ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No ${RBYC_KLUDGE}-tagged ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found"
  fi
  buh_e

  buh_warn "${RBYC_KLUDGE} requires a clean git tree."
  buh_line "If you have uncommitted changes, commit them first.  This is by"
  buh_line "design — container images not backed by git commits easy to confuse."
  buh_e

  buh_step2 "${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your workload container — where Claude Code"
  buh_line "runs. The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} includes SSH, node, and the Claude CLI."
  buh_e
  buh_line "This command is different from the ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_KLUDGE}. It builds the"
  buh_line "${RBYC_BOTTLE} AND drives the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
  buh_line "automatically:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Two ${RBYC_KLUDGE} commands, two different jobs:"
  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_fk}  — standalone ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${RBYC_KLUDGE}. Produces a ${RBYC_HALLMARK}, touches nothing else."
  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_cKB} — ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}-aware ${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_KLUDGE}. Builds AND installs the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}."
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} is shared across ${RBYC_NAMEPLATES}, so you ${RBYC_KLUDGE} it standalone"
  buh_line "and drive the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} yourself. The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} belongs to one ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE},"
  buh_line "so the tool does the driving for you."
  buh_e

  # Bottle kludge image probe
  if test "${z_bottle_image_exists}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_KLUDGE}-tagged ${RBYC_BOTTLE} image found locally"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No ${RBYC_KLUDGE}-tagged ${RBYC_BOTTLE} image found"
  fi
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 2: Drive sentry hallmark into the nameplate
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Drive ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "A ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} is the file that defines a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} — it specifies"
  buh_line "what ${RBYC_HALLMARK} to use for ${RBYC_SENTRY}, ${RBYC_PENTACLE}, and"
  buh_line "${RBYC_BOTTLE} containers. It lives at:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   ${z_nameplate_file}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RBRN} file has two ${RBYC_HALLMARK} fields — one for the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
  buh_line "and one for the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}. The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_KLUDGE} (Step 1.2) already drove"
  buh_line "its ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Now you drive the ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} by hand."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Open the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} file and paste the ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from Step 1.1"
  buh_line "into the ${z_cmd_sentry_hallmark} field."
  buh_e
  buh_line "This is deliberately manual — it teaches you what ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} are and"
  buh_line "where they live. You just saw the automated version with the ${RBYC_BOTTLE};"
  buh_line "now you see the mechanism underneath."
  buh_e

  # Hallmark probes
  if test "${z_sentry_hallmark_present}" = "1"; then
    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_sentry_field} = ${z_sentry_hallmark}"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK is empty — paste the ${RBYC_SENTRY} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from Step 1.1"
  fi
  if test "${z_bottle_hallmark_present}" = "1"; then
    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_bottle_field} = ${z_bottle_hallmark}"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK is empty — run Step 1.2 (${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_KLUDGE})"
  fi
  buh_e

  buh_line "After editing, commit the change — the next ${RBYC_KLUDGE} will need a"
  buh_line "clean tree:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   git add ${z_nameplate_file}"
  buh_code "   git commit -m \"Drive sentry hallmark into ${z_moniker} nameplate\""
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 3: Charge the crucible
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CHARGE} the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} starts three containers from your ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  ${RBYC_SENTRY}    — runs iptables + dnsmasq, enforces the network allowlist"
  buh_line "  ${RBYC_PENTACLE}  — establishes the network namespace shared with the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
  buh_line "  ${RBYC_BOTTLE}    — your workload container (Claude Code lives here)"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} mediates all traffic. The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} never touches the"
  buh_line "network directly — everything routes through the ${RBYC_SENTRY_P} rules."
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} takes 10-30 seconds. It pulls the images from your local"
  buh_line "Docker, creates the ${RBYC_ENCLAVE} network, starts the containers,"
  buh_line "waits for the ${RBYC_SENTRY} to confirm its iptables rules are"
  buh_line "applied, then starts the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}."
  buh_e

  # Charged probe
  if test "${z_crucible_charged}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} ${z_moniker} is charged (${RBYC_BOTTLE} container running)"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} ${z_moniker} is not charged"
  fi
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 4: Enter the container and run Claude Code
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Enter the container and run Claude Code"
  buh_e
  buh_line "SSH into the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_cmd_ssh}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "You land as the claude user in ~/workspace, which contains"
  buh_line "a small sample project. Run Claude Code:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   claude"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Claude Code will prompt you to authenticate. It opens a URL —"
  buh_line "copy it to your workstation browser, sign in with your Claude"
  buh_line "subscription, and paste the code back into the terminal."
  buh_e
  buh_warn "The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} pins Claude Code to a specific version."
  buh_line "Versions after v2.1.89 have a regression where paste does not"
  buh_line "work in the OAuth input prompt through SSH or docker exec"
  buh_line "(github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/47745). If you"
  buh_line "update the pin and paste stops working, type the code manually."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Once authenticated, Claude Code starts in full autonomy mode —"
  buh_line "no permission prompts. Inside a network-contained ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE},"
  buh_line "this is the correct posture: the ${RBYC_SENTRY} enforces the real"
  buh_line "security boundary, not the tool permission system."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Try your first interaction:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   The count_words.sh script has bugs — can you find and fix them?"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Watch Claude read the files, identify issues, and edit the code."
  buh_line "The workspace is a bind mount — edits inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} are"
  buh_line "visible on the host filesystem, and vice versa. Your repo"
  buh_line "working tree gets dirty when you work inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE},"
  buh_line "and that is the point."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Why SSH instead of docker exec?"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Docker exec is laggy and breaks terminal resize — Claude Code's"
  buh_line "interactive display needs correct dimensions. SSH gives a proper"
  buh_line "login session with full terminal negotiation."
  buh_e
  buh_line "If SSH fails, ${RBYC_RACK} is the diagnostic fallback —"
  buh_line "docker exec into the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} to inspect state:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 5: Verify network containment
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Verify network containment"
  buh_e
  buh_line "From inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} (while SSH'd in), you can test what's reachable."
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} allows Anthropic and ${z_test_domain} (a test"
  buh_line "target — ICANN-owned, stable). Everything else is blocked."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Run these curl commands inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://api.anthropic.com"
  buh_line "   Expected: 404 (API wants auth, not bare GET)"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://claude.ai"
  buh_line "   Expected: 403 (web app)"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://${z_test_domain}"
  buh_line "   Expected: 200 (test target on allowlist)"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://google.com"
  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://registry.npmjs.org"
  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} enforces this with two layers:"
  buh_line "dnsmasq resolves only whitelisted domains; iptables drops"
  buh_line "packets to any IP not in the CIDR allowlist. Both layers"
  buh_line "must agree for traffic to pass."
  buh_e
  buh_line "${z_test_domain} is included in the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
  buh_line "specifically for this verification step — it proves the"
  buh_line "allowlist works for a non-Anthropic domain."
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 6: Quench the crucible
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "${RBYC_QUENCH} the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_QUENCH} stops and removes all three containers and the"
  buh_line "${RBYC_ENCLAVE} network:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH}" "${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Clean shutdown. The images stay cached locally — your next ${RBYC_CHARGE}"
  buh_line "reuses them instantly."
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Iteration loop
  # =================================================================
  buh_section "The iteration loop"
  buh_e
  buh_line "You now have the full local cycle:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  1. Edit the Dockerfile or entrypoint"
  buh_line "  2. Commit your changes (${RBYC_KLUDGE} needs a clean tree)"
  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
  buh_line  "  4. Commit the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} change"
  buh_line  "  5. ${RBYC_CHARGE}: Stop and restart"
  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
  buh_line  "  6. SSH in:"
  buh_line  "       ${z_cmd_ssh}"
  buh_line  "  7. Test your changes"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} tears down any prior state before starting, so you"
  buh_line "don't need to ${RBYC_QUENCH} between iterations — just ${RBYC_CHARGE} again."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Steps 3-7 take under a minute. The ${RBYC_SENTRY} rarely changes, so"
  buh_line "you almost never re-${RBYC_KLUDGE} it — the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your iteration"
  buh_line "target."
  buh_e

  # --- Return to start ---
  buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
  buh_e
}

# eof

290-

292-

294-  if ! git diff --quiet -- "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBRN}" 2>/dev/null; then
295-    buc_die "Nameplate has uncommitted changes: ${ZRBOB_ENV_RBRN} — commit before charging"
296-  fi
297-

rbfd_kludge() {
  zrbfd_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Build vessel image locally for development (no Cloud Build, no GAR push)"
  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Dirty-tree guard — kludge images must correspond to a committed state
  buc_step "Verifying clean working tree"
  git diff --quiet \
    || buc_die "Working tree has unstaged changes — commit before kludge"
  git diff --cached --quiet \
    || buc_die "Index has staged changes — commit before kludge"

  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path)
  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${1:-}"
  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"

  # Load vessel configuration
  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"

  # Validate conjure mode (bind and graft don't have local Dockerfiles)
  test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" = "conjure" \
    || buc_die "Kludge only supports conjure vessels (got: ${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE})"
  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" \
    || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' has no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE"
  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT:-}" \
    || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' has no RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT"
  test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" \
    || buc_die "Dockerfile not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
  test -d "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" \
    || buc_die "Build context not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"

  # Resolve base images (use ORIGIN directly — no GAR enshrine lookup for local builds)
  local z_build_args=()
  local z_slot="" z_origin_var="" z_origin=""
  for z_slot in 1 2 3; do
    z_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_slot}_ORIGIN"
